brand: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa jun chapanic
docTitle: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa mapa · Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa jun chapanic
metaDesc: Cha'tereneba' ri u be ri Ojer Pixab, ri u c'aslemal ri Jesus, xukuje' ri u binem ri Pablo puwi' jun kas mapa — ri Loc'olaj Pixab xc'ulmataj pa kas tak luwar.

s.kicker: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa jun chapanic · Mapa
s.title: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa mapa
s.verse: “Aretak xkatzijoj ri u cuinem xukuje' ri u petic ri Kajaw Jesucrist chiwe, man xkatzijoj ta chomanic chiwe ri xa' ta pa qui jolom ri winak elinak wi ulok, xane kas uj xujilow ri u nimalil ri Jesucrist.” (Ucab Pedro 1:16)
s.purpose: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab man are ta sachibal na'oj. Are jun tz'ibanic chquij ri winak ri xebin puwi' kas tak luwar, kas tak k'ij, ruc' kas tak bi'aj. Cha'tereneba' wa' tak be puwi' jun mapa, pa u wäch ri k'ij — cha'chapa' jun c'olibal, o cha'pitz'a' ▶ che u binem jujun rat'al jujun rat'al.
s.ot_kick: ① Ojer Pixab — pa u be ri k'ij
s.ot_h: Chreje ri banoj c'ä che ri tzelejem pa Jerusalen
s.ot_lead: Man xa ta jun binem, xane' ri u be ri tzijonem re toc'obanic chreje ri banoj: banoj ruc' tzakic → butic ruc' Babel → jun sic'inic (Abraham) → ri ulew yo'm pa bixonem → Elem → juyub takaj → ch'aquibal → ajawibal → jachanic → c'amem bic → tzelejem.
s.je_kick: ② C'ac' Pixab — ri u c'aslemal ri Jesus
s.je_lead: Cha'tereneba' ri u c'aslemal ri Jesus jacha' cäquibij ri utzalaj tak tzij, pa u wäch — chreje ri u winakirem pa Belen, ru kasan ha' ruc' ru patan pa Galilea, chreje Samaria, c'ä che ri ripibal, c'astajibal ruc' paki'bal chicaj pa Jerusalen.
s.pa_kick: ③ C'ac' Pixab — ri u binem ri Pablo
s.pa_h: Chreje Antioquía c'ä che ru chi' ri uwächulew — Roma
s.pa_lead: Chreje ri Pentecostés pa Jerusalen, jas che ri utzalaj tzij xel bic chrij ri Judea — chreje ri Asia Menor ruc' ri Europa c'ä che ru c'u'x ri nimalaj takanic. Cha'cha' jun chque ri jo'ob binem (nabe·ucab·rox + ri binem pa Roma + xterene' ri tzokopixic) xukuje' cha'tereneba' ri nimak tak banoj re ri Banoj ruc' ri wuj ri xtz'ibax pa ri be.
s.foot: Jawi' xpe wi · Ri tak luwar cäquitereneb ri tz'ibatal Tzij ruc' ri kas etamabal re ri luwar re ri Loc'olaj Pixab (ruc' ri c'ac' tak bi'aj jawi' cäto'nic). Ri u chi' tak mar, ri nima', ruc' ri cho e esam che ri jamalic etamabal re ri uwächulew (Natural Earth), q'uexom che jun sakil.
s.contact: Pakbal tak tzij · na'oj — Cha'taka' jun wuj chke

eden.name: Edén (Banoj · Tzakic)
eden.today: ri luwar re ri Tigris–Eufrates wacamic
eden.note: Pa jun uwächulew ri banom «sibalaj utz», cäoc ri mac xukuje' cuq'upij ri rachilanic chquixo'l ri Dios ruc' ri winak.
events: Wakib k'ij re banoj — «sibalaj utz»
Ri winak banom che u wäch ri Dios
Ri tzakic, xukuje' ri elem bic pa Eden
Ri nabe u bixic ri utzalaj tzij — «ri rija'lil ri ixok cuwach' na ri u jolom ri cumatz»

noah.name: Ararat (Ri Butic)
noah.today: ri juyub Ararat, relbal k'ij re Turquía, wacamic
noah.note: Ri Dios cuk'at tzij puwi' jun uwächulew nojinak che mac, pune' jeri' cuchajij ri c'aslemal rumal xa jun ja.
events: Jun uwächulew nojinak che etzelal
Ri butic, xukuje' ri barco re ri Noé
Ri trato re ri arco iris — «man cäpe ta chi jun butic che u sachic ronojel»

babel.name: Ri Torre re Babel
babel.note: Chrij ri nimal ri cäraj cäopan c'ä chicaj, ri Dios cusach u wäch ri qui ch'abal xukuje' cuquiya' u wäch ri winak cho ronojel ri uwächulew.
events: «Chbana', jun tinimit ruc' jun torre… che u banic ka bi'»
Ri Dios cusach u wäch ri qui ch'abal
Ri winak cäquiya' quib cho ri uwächulew (Sinar — xterene' Babilon)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Ri tzijonem re toc'obanic re ri Loc'olaj Pixab cächaplet ruc' ri u sic'ixic xa jun achi.
events: Ri Dios cusic'ij ri Abram che Ur re ri caldeos
«Quinban na jun nim tinimit awuc'… conojel ri winak cäquirik na tewichibal rumal awech»
Rumal ri cojonic cuya' can ru tinimit

haran.name: Harán
haran.note: Pa ri be, cunimaj ri sic'inic chreje ri ulew yo'm pa bixonem.
events: Ri familia re ri Taré cäcanaj can pa Harán
Cäcäm ri Taré
Ruc' 75 junab, ri Abram cäbe pa Canaán

shechem.name: Siquem · Canaán
shechem.note: Pa ri ulew yo'm pa bixonem cäwinakir jun familia xukuje' ri trato cäk'ax pa tak ri alaxic.
events: Aretak coc pa Canaán, ri nabe altar — «che ri awija'lil quinya' wi na wa' ulew»
Ri trato (Chapletajic 15) · Isaac · Jacob
Ri cablajuj u c'ojol ri Jacob — u xe' ri cablajuj alaxic

egypt.name: Ejipt (Gosen)
egypt.today: ri Delta re ri Nilo, Ejipt, wacamic
egypt.note: Jun familia cux jun nim tinimit — te c'ut jun tinimit re patanijela'b.
events: Ri José, ri xc'ayixic, cäpaki' che takanic pa Ejipt
Ronojel ri familia re ri Jacob cäkaj ulok che u tzelexic chuwäch ri wa'ijal
Ri tinimit Israel ri tajin cänimaric cäux che patanijela'b

sinai.name: Ri juyub Sinaí
sinai.note: Ri nimalaj toc'obanic re ri Ojer Pixab — ri patanijela'b queux ru tinimit ri Dios.
events: Ri lajuj c'axc'olil xukuje' ri carnel re Pascua
Cäjakataj ri quiäk mar xukuje' queic'ow chrij
Ri Lajuj Pixab, ri Pixab, ri rachoch ri Dios ruc' ri sipanic

kadesh.name: Cades (juyub takaj)
kadesh.today: ri juyub takaj re Sinaí–Néguev wacamic
kadesh.note: Ri man cojonic cuya' che jun alaxic cutzako ri ulew — pune' jeri' ri Dios cäcanaj cuc'.
events: Cablajuj achijab che rilic — are c'u ri winak man cäcaj ta cäquicuba' qui c'u'x
38 junab pa ri juyub takaj — manaj, sutz' ruc' k'ak'
Pa tak ri takaj re Moab, ri k'isbal u tzij ri Moisés (Ri Deuteronomio)

jericho.name: Jerico
jericho.note: Che ri k'isbal queboc xukuje' cäquic'am ri ulew yo'm pa bixonem.
events: Cäjakataj ri Jordán xukuje' queic'ow ri winak chrij
Cätzak ri tapia re Jerico
Ri ch'aquibal re Canaán ruc' ri jachbal re ri ulew

shiloh.name: Silo (K'atal tak Tzij)
shiloh.note: Man c'o ta ajawinel, chquijujunal cäquiban ri cäkaj chquiwäch — rajawaxic jun kas ajawinel.
events: Cäyac ri rachoch ri Dios pa Silo
Ri jutak mul re mac–c'axc'olil–toc'obanic (Débora, Gedeón, Sansón)
Rut — jiquilal pa c'axalaj tak k'ij, pa ri rija'lil ri David

jerusalem.name: Jerusalen · Ri jun ajawibal
jerusalem.note: Ri nimalaj k'ij re Israel — xukuje' ri u bixic jun ajawinel chbe k'ij sak.
events: Saúl ri nabe ajawinel, te c'ut ri David ruc' ri Goliat
Ri trato ruc' ri David — «ri a tem re ajawibal cäc'oji' na chbe k'ij sak» (Ucab Samuel 7)
Ri Salomón cuban ri rachoch ri Dios pa Jerusalen

samaria.name: Samaria · Ri q'upital ajawibal
samaria.note: Cäjach ri ajawibal xukuje' cätzak aretak ri k'axal tak tzij cäquirak qui chi'.
events: Xterene' ri Salomón, ri jachanic pa Juda ruc' Israel
Ri xajbal idolos jutak mul
Elías, Isaiy, Jeremiy cäquibij «chixtzelej» — xukuje' cäquibij ri Mesias ri cäpe na

nineveh.name: Ninive (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Rumal man xquita ta ri pixabaxic, ri ajawibal re ri norte nabe cätzakic.
events: Ninive, ru nimalaj tinimit ri Asiria
Ri ajawibal re ri norte cätzak chuwäch ri Asiria (722 nabe che K.)
Cätak ri Jonás pa Ninive

babylon.name: Babilon
babylon.book: Ucab Ajawinelab 25 · Ri Daniel · Ri Ezequiel
babylon.note: Ri kas k'equ'malaj ak'ab — pune' jeri' ri u bixic re utzalanem cäcanaj canok.
events: Cätzak ri Jerusalen, cäporox ri rachoch ri Dios (586 nabe che K.)
Ri Juda cäc'am bic pa Babilon
Daniel ruc' Ezequiel — cojonic ruc' wächbal pa ri c'amem bic

susa.name: Susa (Persia)
susa.note: Pune' pa ru c'u'x jun ajawibal re man e cojonel taj, ri Dios cuchajij ru tinimit.
events: Ri Persia cuch'ac ri Babilon
Ri Ester cuto' ri aj Israel chuwäch ri qui sachic
Ri Nehemiy cäch'aw ruc' ri Dios chuwäch ri ajawinel xukuje' cätakic

return.name: Tzelejem pa Jerusalen
return.book: Ri Esdras · Ri Nehemiy · Ri Malaquias
return.note: Cäquitzelej ulok xukuje' cäquiyac chic — are c'u man c'o ta jun ajawinel. Cäquieyej ri Mesias.
events: Oxib mul tzelejem rumal ru pixab ri Ciro (Zorobabel 538 · Esdras 458 · Nehemiy 444)
Cäyac chic ri rachoch ri Dios xukuje' cäutzalax ri tapia re Jerusalen
Malaquias — cäk'is ri Ojer Pixab: «Quintak bic ri nu tako'n»

bethlehem.name: Belen
bethlehem.note: Ri Mesias yo'm pa bixonem cäpe pa ru tinimit ri David — ri Tzij xux winak.
events: Cäalax pa Belen, ru tinimit ri David
Ri ángeles cäquiya' ri utzalaj tzij chque ri aj yuk'ab
Ri aj etamanelab re relbal k'ij cäpe che qui k'ijilaxic

nazareth.name: Nazaret
nazareth.note: Ri Dios cäqui'y jacha' jun achi pa jun tinimit re jujunel.
events: Cäqui'y pa rachoch jun aj banal che'
Ruc' cablajuj junab, cäc'oto'n ruc' cäc'ul'an tzij pa ri rachoch ri Dios
Xterene' cäetzelax pa ri synagoga re ru tinimit

jordan.name: Ri nima' Jordán
jordan.today: ri u xe' re ri nima' Jordán wacamic
jordan.note: Cächaplet ru patan chquiwäch conojel — cätz'apix rumal ri caj che u C'ojol ri Dios.
events: Cäkasan ha' rumal ri Xuan Bautista
Cäkaj ri Uxlabixel jacha' jun palomax — «Are' wa' ri lok'alaj nu C'ojol»
Cuch'ac ri oxib takchi'nem re ri Satanás pa ri juyub takaj

cana.name: Caná
cana.note: Pa ri nabe cajmabal cuc'ut ri u juluwem.
events: Jun ula' pa jun c'ulanem
Ri ja' xux vino — ri nabe cajmabal
Ri u tijoxelab cäquicojo che

sychar.name: Sicar (Samaria)
sychar.note: Ri nabe be re patan — chreje Jerusalen c'ä pa ri etzelam Samaria.
events: Cuch'ajch'obej ri rachoch ri Dios pa Jerusalen
Chak'ab, ri Nicodemo — «Rajawaxic chi catalax chic»
C'aslic ja' che jun ixok aj Samaria

capernaum.name: Capernaum
capernaum.today: ri u chi' ri cho re Galilea wacamic
capernaum.note: Ru c'olibal re ri patan pa Galilea — waral cäquimol quib ri sic'inic, ri tijonic, ruc' ri c'ulel.
events: Cusic'ij ri chapal tak car xukuje' cäc'oji' waral
Ri tijonic pa ri juyub — «Utz que ri e meba'ib pa ri qui uxlabal»
C'ambal tak tzij re ri ajawibal — xukuje' cänimar ri c'ulel

galilee.name: Ri cho re Galilea
galilee.note: Ruc' u chuk'ab puwi' ronojel ri banom cuc'ut jachin rija'.
events: «Chatana', chuxlan» — cutanaba' ri nimalaj cak'ik'
Cutzuk ri 5,000 winak ruc' wo'ob caxlan wa ruc' quieb car
Cäbin puwi' ri ja'

caesarea_p.name: Cesarea re Filipo
caesarea_p.note: Ri tijoxelab cäquich'obo chi are ri Crist, xukuje' cäjaktaj ri be re ri ripibal.
events: Ri u bixic ri Pedro — «At ri Crist, ru C'ojol ri c'aslic Dios»
Nabe cubij ri u cämical ruc' ri u c'astajibal
Cäjalwachix pa juluwem puwi' ri juyub

jericho.name: Jerico
jericho.note: Pa ri be chreje Jerusalen, cutzucuj ri sachinak.
events: Cuya' u wak'bal che ri moy Bartimeo
Cusic'ij ri Zaqueo, ri yacöl alcabal
«Ri u C'ojol ri Achi xpe che qui tzucuxic ruc' qui colic ri e sachinak»

bethany.name: Betania
bethany.note: Cuc'ut ru takanic puwi' ri cämical chuwäch ri k'isbal wuk re ru c'aslemal.
events: Cuc'astajisaj ri Lázaro che ri mukbal — «In ri c'astajibal ruc' ri c'aslemal»
Ri María cuya' aceite chirij re ri u muquic
Wa' cajmabal cucowirisaj ri chomanic che u camisaxic

jerusalem.name: Jerusalen
jerusalem.note: Ri k'isbal jawi' cuc'ut wi rib ronojel ri Loc'olaj Pixab — ripibal, c'astajibal, paki'bal chicaj.
events: Coc ruc' quicotem; cusachisaj chic ri mesa re ri rachoch ri Dios
Pa ri k'isbal wa'im cuch'aj ri caqan ri tijoxelab
Cäcäm pa ri ripibal
Cäc'astaj pa rox k'ij, te c'ut cäpaki' chicaj

antioch.name: Antioquía
antioch.note: Ri iglesia takanel jawi' cächaplet wi ruc' jawi' cätzelej wi ri patan chque ri man e aj Israel taj.
events: Pa ch'awem ri Uxlabixel cucha' ri Bernabé ruc' ri Saulo
Ri iglesia jawi' nabe xbix wi «cristianos» chque ri cojonelab
U chapbal re ri nabe, ucab ruc' rox binem

seleucia.name: Seleucia
seleucia.note: Ru puerto ri Antioquía — cäquichap qui be pa Chipre.

salamis.name: Salamina (Chipre)
salamis.note: Ri nabe c'olibal pa Chipre — cäquitzijoj ri tzij pa tak ri synagoga.

paphos.name: Pafos
paphos.note: Cäc'ut ru chuk'ab chquiwäch ri quic'ulelaj ri utzalaj tzij.
events: Ri Elimas ri aj itz cäux moy
Ri Sergio Paulo, ri k'atal tzij, cäcojonic
Chreje waral ri «Pablo» cäc'oji' chuwäch

perga.name: Perge
perga.note: Jun puerto pa Panfilia — waral ri Xuan Marcos cätzelej canok.

pantioch.name: Antioquía re Pisidia
pantioch.note: Ri utzalaj tzij cäjakataj chquiwäch ri man e aj Israel taj.
events: Jun nim u tzij re ri tzijonem re toc'obanic pa ri synagoga
E q'uia chque ri man e aj Israel taj cäquiquicotic xukuje' cäquic'am ri tzij
Cäquesax bic rumal ri c'ulanem

iconium.name: Iconio
iconium.note: E q'uia cäquicojo, are c'u ri c'axc'olisanic cuya' chque chi queböc.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Cäbix dios che, te c'ut cäch'ay che abaj.
events: Cucunaj jun achi ri man cäcuin ta cäbin chreje ru alaxic
Ri winak cäcaj cäquiya' sipanic chque jacha' dioses
Cäch'ay che abaj xukuje' cäcanaj can jacha' cäminak, pune' jeri' cäwalijic

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: E q'uia cäux tijoxelab; cäquitzelej qui be che qui cowirisaxic ri iglesias.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Ri k'olibal jawi' ri utzalaj tzij nabe cäbe wi pa Europa.
events: Jun wächbal re jun achi aj Macedonia
«Catpe waral, cojato'o»
Chanim queic'ow pa Europa

philippi.name: Filipos
philippi.note: Ri nabe iglesia pa Europa — ri utzalaj tzij cäch'acan pune' pa che'.
events: Ri Lidia, ri c'ayinel morada atz'iyak, cäcojonic
Cätzokopix jun ali patanijel ri c'o jun uxlabal re q'ijinic ruc'
Bix pa nic'aj ak'ab, jun cabraqan, cäcolotaj ri rachoch ri chajinel re che'

thess.name: Tesalónica
thess.note: Ri tzij cusil ri tinimit xukuje' cäpoc'ow ri c'ulanem.
events: Cätzijon pa ri synagoga oxib uxlanibal k'ij
«Ri e winak ri' ri quisuk'um ri uwächulew»
Cäquelaq'uij quib chak'ab

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Ri e «utz» ri xquic'ot u wäch ri tzij chquijujunal.
events: Cäquic'am ri tzij ruc' ronojel qui c'u'x
Ronojel k'ij cäquisic'ij ri Tz'ibatalic che rilic we kas tzij
E q'uia cäquichap cojonic

athens.name: Atenas
athens.note: Pa ru tinimit ri aj no'jib cutzijoj ri «Dios ri man etamatal taj».
events: Cäyactaj ranima rumal jun tinimit nojinak che idolos
Puwi' ri Areópago cutzijoj ri Banöl ruc' ri c'astajibal
Cäyok'ic, pune' jeri' e jujun cäquicojo

corinth.name: Corinto
corinth.note: Cäcanaj jun junab ruc' nic'aj, cuyac jun iglesia pa jun tinimit re etzelal.
events: Cuban tak carpa ruc' ri Aquila ruc' ri Priscila
«Maxi'ij awib… rumal chi in c'o awuc'»
E q'uia aj Corinto cäquicojo xukuje' cäkasan qui ha'

ephesus.name: Éfeso
ephesus.note: Ru c'u'x re ri rox binem — ri tzij cäquij u wäch pa ronojel Asia.
events: Cutijoj winak ronojel k'ij quieb junab pa ru ja ri Tiranno
Cäporox ri wuj re itz; nimak tak chac
Ri Demetrio, ri banal jastak re plata, cuyac jun ch'o'j

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Jun oq'ejabal jachbal chque ri e ri'jab re ri iglesia re Éfeso.
events: «Chichajij ri iglesia ri xulok' ruc' ru quic'el»
Cäquiq'oq' ri e ri'jab, cäquetamaj chi man cäquil ta chic u wäch

caesarea.name: Cesarea
caesarea.today: ri u chi' ri mar re Israel wacamic
caesarea.note: Pa quieb junab cuto' ru wäch ri utzalaj tzij chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij ruc' jun ajawinel.
events: K'atbal tzij chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij Félix ruc' Festo
Cuto' ru wäch chuwäch ri ajawinel Agripa
«Quinya' wib pa ru k'ab ri César» — chreje pa Roma

jerusalem.name: Jerusalen
jerusalem.note: Cächapik pa ri rachoch ri Dios, cächaplet ri u be jacha' jun aj che'.
events: Cächap rumal ri winak pa ri rachoch ri Dios
Cuto' rib chuwäch ri molaj k'atal tzij
Rumal chi are jun aj tinimit re Roma, cätak chajital pa Cesarea

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Cäquijal qui be pa jun barco aj Alejandría ri cäbe pa Roma.

fairhaven.name: Utzalaj tak Puerto (Creta)
fairhaven.note: Ri u pixab ri Pablo che u tanabaxic ri binem man cäta taj.

crete.name: Creta
crete.note: Xterene' ri u tzokopixic, ri ch'akap ulew jawi' cucanaj wi ri Tito che qui banic suc' ri iglesias.
events: Cucanaj ri Tito che qui cojic e ri'jab pa ronojel tinimit
Cutz'onoj c'amal tak be ri man c'o ta qui mac, e jiquilic
Cutz'ibaj ri wuj che ri Tito

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Chuxo'l ri cak'ik' ruc' ri paxbal barco, ri u bixic ri Dios cäc'oji' jic.
events: Ri nimalaj cak'ik' cupaxij ri barco, pune' jeri' conojel ri 276 cäquirik qui colic
Cäti' rumal jun cumatz, pune' jeri' man c'o ta c'ax c'ulmatajinak
Cucunaj ri e yawab re ri ch'akap ulew

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Queopan pa Italia xukuje' cäquic'ulaj cumal ri rachalal cojonelab.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Banoj 28 · Wuj tz'ibam pa che' · Ucab Timotey
rome.note: Ri utzalaj tzij cäopan che ru c'u'x ri nimalaj takanic — man are ta k'isbal, xane' jun u chapic.
events: Quieb junab tz'apital pa jun ja, cutzijoj ri ajawibal ruc' cowilal
Chreje waral cutz'ibaj ri Wuj tz'ibam pa che' (Aj Epesib·Aj Filipenseb·Aj Colosayib·Filemón)
Xterene' cätz'apix chic jun mul, cutz'ibaj ri Ucab Timotey xukuje' cäcamisaxic — «Xinch'ojij ri utzalaj ch'o'j, xintz'akatisaj ri anibal»

journeys.j5: Ri ro'ob binem · xterene' ri tzokopixic
